THE NANI
From Sabyasachi Accessories

“My mother’s mother, my grandmother, was an exceptional woman and one of my greatest influences. She was exuberant, excessive and an absolute maximalist. She was never without her potli, a draw string pouch lined with a delicious pomegranate pink velvet. We spent the sweltering summer holidays together, and I remember her dipping into her handbag to buy us all kind of treats—ice-lollies, turmeric laced popcorn and matinee movies at the cinema.”

#Sabyasachi #TheWorldOfSabyasachi #SabyasachiAccessories

SPOT THE TIGER
100% Cashmere Sweaters
 
In stores now
 
 
 
@thebadlydrawnboy @sandhyashekar @miteshrajani @yqnnick @ul_boss @zabrovskaya @vaanirastogi @sapnakumarjewellery @tallgirltales @jakcekkin @bazzrom @vivekdhiman007 @morgenthalfrederics #Sabyasachi #TheWorldOfSabyasachi #SabyasachiJewellery #SabyasachiAccessories #SabyasachiXMorgenthalFrederics

THE NEW INDIA
THE MODERN INTER-CULTURAL WEDDING DRESS CODE
 
In an age of noise, Sabyasachi chooses silence, intention over conformity, and substance over spectacle.
This is not bridal wear for performance. It’s a refusal to conform. It ignores trends and refutes that tradition must be loud to be appreciated.
Lehengas, rich with craft, are paired with quiet dupattas so the embroidery can breathe. The styling is spare; jewellery edited; every detail essential. She chooses with discernment and wears heritage as presence, not performance.
In the New India, maximalism and minimalism meet like memory and intention. A balance. A tightrope above the stereotypical. As brides declare for themselves who they are; when they seek truth over validation, they become a catalyst for change. As Sabyasachi has always said: “For heritage to be relevant, it must be dynamic.”

Choreographed by @sreenandashankar
#Sabyasachi #TheWorldOfSabyasachi #SabyasachiJewellery #SabyasachiAccessories #SabyasachiXMorgenthalFrederics

THE NANI
From Sabyasachi Accessories

“My mother’s mother, my grandmother, was an exceptional woman and one of my greatest influences. She was exuberant, excessive and an absolute maximalist. She was never without her potli, a draw string pouch lined with a delicious pomegranate pink velvet. We spent the sweltering summer holidays together, and I remember her dipping into her handbag to buy us all kind of treats—ice-lollies, turmeric laced popcorn and matinee movies at the cinema.”

#Sabyasachi #TheWorldOfSabyasachi #SabyasachiAccessories

OPIUM REVISITED
 
In 2013, Sabyasachi envisioned Opium—a glamorous tale tinged with the melancholy of the forbidden. A secret corridor linking North Calcutta and South Shanghai: two ports strung together by culture and trade, music and smoke.
 
Twelve years later, we present a revival of this collection from the Sabyasachi archives.

Limited edition collectibles from The Curiosity, Art & Antiquity Project by Sabyasachi Calcutta.
 
 
@tarunvishwaofficial @paraffinfilms @sandhyashekar @miteshrajani @svetagoingmad @mahiekasharma @reachnushkie @tanmoy.chakraborty.7739 @mishra_debojyoti #Sabyasachi #TheWorldOfSabyasachi #SabyasachiJewellery #SabyasachiAccessories #BridesOfSabyasachi

THE NEW WORLD
THE MODERN MULTICULTURAL WEDDING DRESS CODE
 
In love, everything becomes ancestral. This collection is about heritage in motion.
 
As more Indian men and women find love across continents, cultures, and genders, I find myself drawn to the quiet transformations taking place inside weddings. Cross-cultural unions are entering Indian tradition with humility.
 
“The New World” is my response to this moment: a bridal collection that leans into traditional silhouettes but is stripped of excess. The jewellery is edited, deliberate. The fabrics are still opulent, but the styling is more nuanced. The dupattas are lighter, sometimes even translucent. There is a dignity in their weightlessness.
 
This is not a dilution of culture; it is refinement. For these couples, their choices speak of initiation, not appropriation, presence over performance. Occidental preference to edit has found harmony with the oriental instinct to ornament. This is India; not inherited but chosen, which is the most modern act of all.

Explore Balsam, a collection of hand-painted botanical prints on lightweight summer saris and garments. body_text:
YOU GOTTA TRY THIS TOO🥹🥹 Ily @moxiebeautyofficial 

When my partner decided to grow his long curly hair out, we tried a bunch of products for him and Moxie is till date his go-to. It was so fun to scrunch his hair and play with his locks- it used to make me wonder how nice it would be to be able to do it for myself! MANIFESTED THAT HARD 😂😂 cuz now I do get to scrunch my own hair!!! 

Moxie has this theory which they call the Moxie Wavy Theory that suggests 70% of Indians have wavy hair. We’ve been using products to tame our “frizz” all these years because we never had the correct care or routines for wavy hair in particular!

In comes the Moxie Wavy Hair Care Routine that puts emphasis on how 💦hydration💦 is key to keeping your hair nourished and shiny. ✨Hydration is what shields against frizz✨
I didn’t know that!! 

And how does one lock that hydration? With the goodness of chia & flax seed in the form of a serum gel. 🥰🥰

Honestly, it took two tries to get the amount I need to use right. Initially I used way too much but then I saw their tutorials- you’re only supposed to use a pea sized amount or max and almond size if your hair is longer! JUST THAT MUCH😨😱

It doesn’t feel like too much effort and has elevated hair wash days for me. 🥰

Been using since 21 April and am completely floored! ❤️

#haircare #wavyhair #indianhair #fyp #foryou

title: Masterpiece on Your Wrist
body_text:
Not all timepieces are created equal.
Each of these is one-of-a-kind, embedding rare Indian coins from the past 100 years.
No replicas. No reruns.
Choose your legacy — before someone else wears it first.

title: Wear The Roar. Own The Room
body_text: The Baagh Diamond Watch isn't just timekeeping — it's a statement. Hand-set diamonds. Precision craftsmanship. A presence that walks in before you do. Limited pieces available.

title: The Watch That Tells More Than Time
body_text:
Anyone can buy a luxury watch.
Very few can wear history.
"The One" carries a genuine 1938–40 Quarter Anna coin — a relic from pre-Independence India — set into a hand-finished dial. It tells time. It also tells a story no other watch on earth can.
Handcrafted in Jaipur. Automatic. Sapphire crystal. Peep-hole case back.

title: Jaipur Watch Company
body_text:
From cinema to culture, these icons share one thing in common — an eye for timeless detail.
Jaipur Watch Company isn’t just worn. It’s chosen.

Because legacy isn’t loud.
It’s lasting.

title: The Watch With A Dancing Peacock
body_text:
Watch the peacock dance.
The upper dial of this watch actually rotates — turning shaped stones over a real peacock feather beneath, so the bird seems to come alive on your wrist. Hand-set American diamonds. Rose gold case. Sapphire crystal. 15 days of craftsmanship per piece.
This isn't a watch you wear. It's one you watch.

title: Frido ErgoLuxe Executive Chair
body_text:
This chair is NOT for everyone. And that’s the point.

If you work 10–12 hours a day, run a business, create for a living, or make decisions that actually matter your chair isn’t furniture anymore.
It’s infrastructure, it’s a wise investment.✨

I’ve been using the @myfrido Frido ErgoLuxe Executive Chair, and this is clearly built for people who prioritise long-term comfort, posture, and performance over shortcuts.🔥

⬇️ Why this chair stands out (and justifies its price):

• 145° recline with multi-lock positions — work, read, or reset without compromising posture
• 3D adjustable neckrest — moves exactly where your neck needs support
• Integrated lumbar support — keeps your spine neutral during long sessions
• 3D adjustable armrests — height, depth, angle… everything dialed in
• Wide, premium cushioned seat — built for all-day sitting, not quick breaks
• Silent 60mm wheels — smooth, noise-free movement
• In-built footrest — underrated, but a game changer for late-night work
• Solid, executive-grade build quality — feels premium, looks premium, lasts long

My honest take ⬇️

This isn’t a “nice-to-have” chair.
It’s for people who sit for hours, value their health, and don’t want back pain to be the cost of ambition.

If you’re serious about your work, your setup should be too.

Visit now at https://myfrido.com

• Integrated lumbar support — keeps your spine neutral during long sessions
• 3D adjustable armrests — height, depth, angle… everything dialed in
• Wide, premium cushioned seat — built for all-day sitting, not quick breaks
• Silent 60mm wheels — smooth, noise-free movement

This isn’t a “nice-to-have” chair.
It’s for people who sit for hours, value their health, and don’t want back pain to be the cost of ambition.

If you’re serious about your work, your setup should be too.
